selections.name: Famous Figure (ire)
selections.reason: Impressive 6-length victory in last start over hurdles, showing excellent stamina and jumping ability.

selections.name: Cyber Ninja
selections.reason: Strong class profile with a win two starts back; handles the distance and firm turf well.

selections.name: Mr Percy (ire)
selections.reason: Consistent in hurdle stakes, always in the mix and gets a good rider in Watters.

selections.name: Lord Flintshire
selections.reason: Veteran turf runner with solid back class and a decent third-place finish last out.

danger_horse.name: Morning March
danger_horse.reason: Won three back, can surprise if pace is hot.

selections.name: Term Premium
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee ran a huge second on debut, earning the field's highest speed figure. Prat rides.

selections.name: Irish Goodbye
selections.reason: Extremely consistent with three consecutive runner-up finishes for Brad Cox. Main threat.

selections.name: In Front Runner
selections.reason: Gun Runner colt should appreciate the dry, fast track after a poor debut on sloppy going.

selections.name: Bakuto
selections.reason: Showed improvement two back when second at Aqueduct; can grab a share with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Tuning In
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for H. James Bond, working well.

selections.name: Tizmarkus
selections.reason: In career-best form with two wins and a second in his last three starts. Santana retains the mount.

selections.name: Princip
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the mount on this consistent gelding who was a good second last time out at Saratoga.

selections.name: Lucky Dude
selections.reason: Veteran runner won his last start at Parx easily; fits well here with Carmouche riding.

selections.name: Kunshan Bridge
selections.reason: Runner-up in his last start at Belmont; has the tactical speed to secure a good position.

danger_horse.name: Screaming Uncle
danger_horse.reason: Front-runner who can prove dangerous if left uncontested on the lead.

selections.name: Arabian Power
selections.reason: Brad Cox-trained gelding has two consecutive close runner-up finishes on turf at Churchill. Irad rides.

selections.name: Franklin Delano
selections.reason: Pletcher trainee has solid turf form and gets Johnny V. Should be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Asked And Answered
selections.reason: Exits a good third-place finish in a Saratoga maiden special weight; fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Alghero
selections.reason: Chad Brown runner gets a rider upgrade to Prat and should improve second off the layoff.

danger_horse.name: Chester Boy
danger_horse.reason: Showed good speed winning last out (though still eligible here) and Franco rides.

selections.name: Extravaganzoo
selections.reason: Ran a very green but promising third on debut at Keeneland; George Weaver is excellent with juveniles.

selections.name: J'ray's Jewel
selections.reason: Mott trainee was a strong second on debut at Belmont, showing good late interest.

selections.name: Beach Life
selections.reason: Pletcher-trained filly showed speed on debut before tiring to third; should be fitter today.

selections.name: All Star Leigh
selections.reason: Well-bred first-time starter for Anthony Dutrow; Jose Ortiz takes the mount.

danger_horse.name: Sweet Lisa
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for Linda Rice who has been working smartly on the main track.

selections.name: Ati Girl
selections.reason: Mott-trained filly has run two excellent seconds at Churchill; Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the mount.

selections.name: Pippa Adds
selections.reason: Pletcher trainee was a solid third at Saratoga last out; possesses strong tactical speed.

selections.name: Raghba
selections.reason: Highly consistent Pletcher runner who has hit the board in multiple maiden special weights.

selections.name: Moonlit
selections.reason: Ran a strong second on debut at Belmont; should appreciate the stretch-out to nine furlongs.

danger_horse.name: Jadorlinija
danger_horse.reason: Clement trainee showed improvement when third last out; Santana rides.

selections.name: English Law
selections.reason: Classy individual dropping from allowance ranks at Keeneland; Prat rides for Walden.

selections.name: Vintage Vino
selections.reason: Consistent turf runner gets a major rider upgrade to Irad Ortiz Jr. for Linda Rice.

selections.name: Ciro Di Marzio
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee has high back class; if ready off the long layoff, he is a major threat.

selections.name: Sicilian Defense
selections.reason: Exits tough allowance races at Churchill and Keeneland; fits well with this claiming group.

danger_horse.name: Coach Case
danger_horse.reason: Clement trainee has run well against tougher and should be competitive here.

selections.name: Palacios
selections.reason: Highly consistent gelding gets Irad Ortiz Jr. after a strong runner-up finish at Churchill.

selections.name: Gethsemane
selections.reason: Linda Rice trainee has been running well in Kentucky and gets Jose Ortiz.

selections.name: Max Money
selections.reason: Maker runner won two back at Aqueduct and should appreciate the drop back to starter allowance company.

selections.name: Into The Light
selections.reason: Broke his maiden in impressive fashion last out at Belmont; can take another step forward.

danger_horse.name: Life Is Gravy (ire)
danger_horse.reason: Summers trainee has solid speed figures and Gaffalione rides.

selections.name: Roasted Reds
selections.reason: Showed good potential on debut when fourth at Belmont; Prat rides for Jorge Abreu.

selections.name: Intothewilderness
selections.reason: Drops into maiden claiming ranks and gets Irad Ortiz Jr. for Charlton Baker.

selections.name: Whatta Weekend
selections.reason: Runner-up in her last start at Belmont; has the tactical speed to overcome a wide draw.

selections.name: Island Charm
selections.reason: Consistent performer in this class; Manny Franco takes the mount for Kantarmaci.

danger_horse.name: Zelena
danger_horse.reason: Well-bred filly making her first start since last summer; could surprise if ready.
